title: NDIC Capacity Building Workshop for Law Enforcement Officers
description: NDIC Capacity Building Workshop for Law Enforcement agencies with the theme: Effective Investigation and Prosecution of Banking Malpractices that led to Failure of Banks organised by NDIC in Lagos.
html: NDIC Capacity Building Workshop for Law Enforcement agencies with the theme: Effective Investigation and Prosecution of Banking Malpractices that led to Failure of Banks organised by NDIC in Lagos.
